info.title: JobSphere Org API
info.description: Backend API service for JobSphere Organization

search.description: Search by full name or email (case-insensitive)

suspend.description: True to suspend, false to unsuspend

search.description: Search term for category name or description

participantId.description: ID of the other user in conversation

jobId.description: Optional job ID to link conversation

url.description: Full URL of the uploaded image

jobId.description: ID of the job to mark as complete

contractorId.description: ID of the contractor to invite

status.description: Filter by invite status (supports both old and new status values)
Filter by invite status (supports both old and new status values)

search.description: Search in contractor name, bio, or skills

message.description: Optional message to the job owner

search.description: Search term for job title or description
Search term for title or description

contractorId.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied
Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied

customerId.description: Customer ID who posted the job

isApplied.description: Indicates if the authenticated contractor has applied to this job

notificationIds.description: Array of notification IDs to mark as read

userId.description: User ID to send test notification

url.description: Stripe Checkout URL to open in browser

successUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to on success

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to on cancellation

category.description: Array of category IDs (for contractors) - MongoDB ObjectIds

experience.description: Array of experience IDs (for contractors) - MongoDB ObjectIds

work_samples.description: Array of work sample IDs (for contractors) - MongoDB ObjectIds

certifications.description: Array of certification IDs (for contractors) - MongoDB ObjectIds

get.description: Get all users with optional search, filters, and pagination. Supports filtering by role, location, category, and searching by name or email.

schema.description: Search by full name or email (case-insensitive)

parameters.description: Search by full name or email (case-insensitive)
parameters.name: search

200.description: Users retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

get.description: Get a single user by ID with full details

patch.description: Suspend or unsuspend a user account

post.description: Admin login with email and password

401.description: Invalid credentials or not an admin account

get.description: Get paginated list of completion requests with optional filters

post.description: Admin approves job completion, transfers funds to contractor via Stripe Connect
Admin rejects job completion request with reason

get.description: Get paginated list of withdrawal requests with optional filters

post.description: Admin approves withdrawal, deducts from contractor wallet and initiates Stripe Connect transfer
Admin rejects withdrawal request with reason
Register a new user account

400.description: Validation error or user already exists

post.description: Login with email and password
Request OTP for password reset
Verify OTP before resetting password
Reset password using verified OTP
Refresh access token using refresh token

get.description: Get current authenticated user
Get all categories with optional search and pagination

schema.description: Search term for category name or description

parameters.description: Search term for category name or description
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a new category (Admin only)

400.description: Validation error or category already exists

get.description: Get a single category by ID

400.description: Validation error or category name already exists

get.description: Get all conversations for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new conversation with another user

get.description: Get paginated messages for a specific conversation

post.description: Upload a single image file to ImageKit via server

400.description: No image file provided or invalid file type

get.description: Get authentication parameters for client-side direct upload to ImageKit. Frontend uses these parameters to upload images directly to ImageKit without going through the server.

post.description: Customer marks a job as complete after contractor finishes work. This creates a completion request for admin approval. Admin will then approve the completion, which triggers payment release: 80% to contractor, 20% service fee to admin. Job must be in 'assigned' status with an accepted offer. Uses MongoDB transactions for atomicity.

200.description: Completion request created successfully. Awaiting admin approval for payment release.

data.message: Completion request submitted. Admin will review and approve payment release.

400.description: Bad request - Job not assigned, no accepted offer, or completion request already exists

value.message: Cannot complete job with status: open. Job must be assigned.
Completion request already exists for this job

403.description: Forbidden - Only customer who posted the job can request completion

example.message: You can only complete your own jobs

404.description: Not found - Job or offer not found

value.message: No accepted offer found for this job. Cannot complete job without an accepted offer.

post.description: Customer sends a job invite to a specific contractor. Only one invite per contractor per job is allowed. Note: Customers can invite contractors even if they have already applied to the job.

400.description: Bad request - already invited or job not open

get.description: Get contractors who are available to be invited for a specific job. Returns only contractors who have NOT applied to the job and have NOT been invited yet. Supports search and filtering by category, location, and budget.

schema.description: Search in contractor name, bio, or skills

parameters.description: Search in contractor name, bio, or skills
parameters.name: search

200.description: Available contractors retrieved successfully with pagination and exclusion information

excludedCount.description: Number of contractors excluded (already applied or invited)

get.description: Get all invites sent by the customer with optional filtering by job and status. Supports pagination.

schema.description: Filter by invite status (supports both old and new status values)

parameters.description: Filter by invite status (supports both old and new status values)
parameters.name: status

200.description: Invites retrieved successfully with pagination information

get.description: Get all invites received by the contractor with optional filtering by status. Supports pagination.

schema.description: Filter by invite status (supports both old and new status values)

parameters.description: Filter by invite status (supports both old and new status values)
parameters.name: status

200.description: Invites retrieved successfully with pagination information

get.description: Get details of a specific invite. Accessible by both customer and contractor involved.

403.description: Forbidden - not involved in this invite

delete.description: Customer cancels a sent invite. Only pending invites can be cancelled.

patch.description: Contractor accepts a job invite. Creates a conversation for chat and updates job status.

400.description: Invite already processed or job not available

patch.description: Contractor rejects a job invite with optional reason. Notifies the customer.

post.description: Contractor applies for a job

400.description: Bad request - already applied or job not accepting applications

get.description: Get contractor's own job applications with optional search and filters. Supports pagination and filtering by job criteria.

200.description: Applications retrieved successfully with pagination information

get.description: Get all applications for a specific job (Customer only)
Get all applications received for customer's jobs with optional filtering by job and status. Supports pagination.

200.description: Applications retrieved successfully with pagination information

get.description: Get all jobs with optional search and filters. If authenticated as a contractor, includes 'isApplied' field indicating whether you've applied to each job.

schema.description: Search term for title or description

parameters.description: Search term for title or description
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied

parameters.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied
parameters.name: contractorId

200.description: Jobs retrieved successfully. Each job includes 'isApplied' field (true/false) for contractors.

post.description: Create a new job (Customer only)

get.description: Get a single job by ID

put.description: Update a job (Owner or Admin only)

delete.description: Delete a job (Owner or Admin only)

get.description: Get all jobs posted by the authenticated customer with optional search and filters. When contractorId is provided, returns only jobs where that contractor has NOT been invited and has NOT applied - useful for finding jobs to invite a specific contractor to.

schema.description: Search term for title or description

parameters.description: Search term for title or description
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied

parameters.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied
parameters.name: contractorId

get.description: Get all jobs where the customer has sent offers that are pending contractor response. Shows jobs waiting for contractor to accept or reject. Each job includes offer details (with offerId for cancellation) and contractor information. Excludes jobs in 'in_progress', 'completed', or 'cancelled' status. Supports pagination (page, limit) and optional filtering by contractorId to see offers sent to a specific contractor.
get.summary: Get jobs with pending offers (waiting for contractor response)

schema.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied

parameters.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied
parameters.name: contractorId

200.description: Pending offer jobs retrieved successfully with offer and contractor details

offerId.description: Offer ID - use this to cancel via POST /api/offer/:offerId/cancel

expiresAt.description: When offer expires (7 days from creation)

get.description: Get all jobs where the customer has received applications but NO active offers (pending/accepted). These jobs are available for sending new offers. Jobs with rejected or expired offers ARE included. Each job includes detailed engagement statistics, current pending offer details (with offerId for cancellation), and complete offer history. The 'currentOffer.offerId' field enables frontend to implement offer cancellation functionality.
get.summary: Get engaged jobs with offer details for management

schema.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied

parameters.description: Filter by contractor ID - excludes jobs where this contractor has been invited or has applied
parameters.name: contractorId

get.description: Get contractor's current work pipeline showing jobs where they have received offers or are currently assigned. Returns jobs based on invite-application status: 'offered' (waiting for contractor to accept/reject) or 'assigned' (contractor is working on the job). Each result includes the invite-application details, full job information with populated categories/locations/customer, and customer contact details. Supports optional status filtering and pagination. Default shows both 'offered' and 'assigned' jobs sorted by creation date (newest first).

200.description: Current jobs retrieved successfully with invite-application, job, and customer details

status.description: offered: waiting for contractor response | assigned: contractor is working

job.description: Full job details with populated fields

post.description: Customer marks job as complete. Service fee (20%) is transferred to admin. Contractor payout (80%) is transferred to contractor. Escrow is released. Job status changes to 'completed'.

200.description: Job completed successfully. Payment released to contractor.

400.description: Bad request - Job not in progress or offer not found

patch.description: Update job status. Valid transitions: open→assigned/cancelled, assigned→in_progress/cancelled, in_progress→completed/cancelled. Customer or assigned contractor can update.

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to update this job

post.description: Cancel a job with reason. If offer exists, full refund is issued to customer. Cannot cancel completed jobs. Customer or Admin only.

200.description: Job cancelled successfully. Refund issued if applicable.

400.description: Bad request - Cannot cancel completed job

get.description: Get all locations with optional search and pagination

post.description: Create a new location

400.description: Validation error or location already exists

get.description: Get a location by ID

post.description: Register FCM device token for push notifications

get.description: Get all notifications for authenticated user

post.description: Mark one or more notifications as read
Send push notification to a user (Admin only)
Customer sends an offer to a contractor based on their job application. Money is moved to escrow. Only one offer per job is allowed. Customer pays job amount + 5% platform fee.

201.description: Offer sent successfully. Money moved to escrow. Contractor notified.

400.description: Bad request - Insufficient balance, job not open, or offer already exists

post.description: Customer sends an offer to a contractor based on an accepted job invite. Money is moved to escrow. Only one offer per job is allowed. Customer pays job amount + 5% platform fee. Invite must be in 'accepted' status.

201.description: Offer sent successfully. Money moved to escrow. Contractor notified.

400.description: Bad request - Insufficient balance, job not open, invite not accepted, or offer already exists

post.description: Customer sends a direct offer to a contractor via job ID. Simplified flow without requiring prior application or invite. Customer specifies the contractor ID directly. Money is moved to escrow. Only one offer per job is allowed. Customer pays job amount + 5% platform fee.
post.summary: Send direct offer to contractor (via job ID)

201.description: Offer sent successfully. Money moved to escrow. Contractor notified.

400.description: Bad request - Insufficient balance, job not open, contractor not found, or offer already exists

post.description: Contractor accepts an offer. Platform fee (5%) is transferred to admin. Job status changes to 'assigned'. All other applications are rejected.

200.description: Offer accepted successfully. Platform fee transferred. Job assigned.

400.description: Bad request - Offer not found or already processed

post.description: Contractor rejects an offer with a reason. Full refund (job amount + platform fee) is returned to customer wallet. Application status is reset.

200.description: Offer rejected successfully. Full refund issued to customer.

400.description: Bad request - Offer not found or already processed

post.description: Customer cancels a pending offer if contractor hasn't responded yet. Full refund (job amount + platform fee) is returned to customer wallet. Application/Invite status is reset to allow sending a new offer. Only pending offers can be cancelled. Requires customer ID, contractor ID, and job ID to identify the offer.

200.description: Offer cancelled successfully. Full refund issued to customer wallet.

400.description: Bad request - Offer not pending, already processed, or insufficient escrow balance

403.description: Forbidden - only the customer who sent the offer can cancel it

get.description: Get all reviews with optional filters (sender, receiver, job, rating range) and pagination

200.description: Reviews retrieved successfully with pagination and average rating

post.description: Create a new review for another user. Users cannot review themselves or review the same user twice for the same job.

400.description: Bad request - Cannot review yourself or already reviewed this user for this job

get.description: Get all reviews for a specific user (as receiver) with pagination and average rating calculation

200.description: User reviews retrieved successfully with average rating

get.description: Get all reviews written by the authenticated user

put.description: Update a review. Only the review author can update their review.

403.description: Forbidden - You can only update your own reviews

delete.description: Delete a review. Only the review author can delete their review.

403.description: Forbidden - You can only delete your own reviews

post.description: Seed database with top 50 US cities. Only works if location collection is empty.
Seed database with 3 test users (customer, contractor, admin). Only works if user collection is empty. All users have password: 123456
Seed database with 4 categories (Plumbing, Cleaning, Electrical, Carpentry). Only works if category collection is empty. Copies icon files to uploads folder.
Send a test push notification to a specific user for testing purposes

400.description: Bad request - Invalid user ID or no active devices

get.description: Get all certifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new certification

get.description: Get a single certification by ID
Get all work experiences for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new work experience

get.description: Get a single work experience by ID

Get all users with optional search, filters, and pagination. Supports filtering by role, location, category, and searching by name or email. Returns users with populated location, category, experience, work_samples, certification, and review statistics (for contractors).

schema.description: Search by full name or email (case-insensitive)

parameters.description: Search by full name or email (case-insensitive)
parameters.name: search

200.description: Users retrieved successfully with pagination metadata. Each user includes populated location, category, experience, work_samples, and certification. Contractors include review statistics (total, average, rating distribution, and last 5 reviews).

get.description: Get a single user by ID with full profile details including populated location, category, experience, work_samples, certifications, and jobs. For contractors, includes review statistics (total, average rating, rating distribution, and last 5 reviews).

200.description: User retrieved successfully with all populated fields. Contractors include review statistics.

get.description: Get current authenticated user with full profile details including populated location, category, experience, work_samples, certification, and review statistics (for contractors)

200.description: User retrieved successfully with populated location, category, experience, work_samples, and certification. For contractors, includes review statistics (total, average rating, rating distribution, and last 5 reviews). Excludes sensitive fields (password, refreshTokens, otp).

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

patch.description: Update current user profile with partial updates support. Only send the fields you want to update - all fields are optional. Customers can update: full_name, profile_img, cover_img, phone, address, bio, description, location, availability. Contractors can additionally update: skills, experience (IDs), work_samples (IDs), certifications (IDs), starting_budget, hourly_charge, category. Protected fields (password, role, is_verified, isSuspend) cannot be updated through this endpoint. Returns updated profile with populated fields, review statistics (for contractors), and total job count.

200.description: Profile updated successfully with all populated fields (location, category, experience, work_samples, certifications), review statistics (for contractors), and total job count

400.description: Validation error, invalid IDs (category/location/experience/work_samples/certifications), or no fields to update

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing access token

403.description: Forbidden - Attempting to update contractor-specific fields as a customer

get.description: Get all work samples for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new work sample

get.description: Get a single work sample by ID
Get user's wallet balance and details

post.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session for depositing money into the wallet. Returns a checkout URL that should be opened in the browser. After payment, the browser redirects to /api/wallet/deposit/redirect which shows a success page.

url.description: Stripe Checkout URL to open in browser

successUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to on success

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect the user to on cancellation

get.description: Server-side redirect page after Stripe Checkout. Shows a success/cancelled page with a button to return to the mobile app via deep link. No authentication required.

200.description: HTML page with payment status and deep link to return to the app

post.description: Withdraw money from wallet (contractors only, min $10, max $10,000). Requires Stripe Connect account to be connected and verified.

400.description: Bad request - Insufficient balance, invalid amount, or wallet frozen

get.description: Get user's transaction history with pagination and filtering. Available transaction types: deposit (money added to wallet), withdrawal (money withdrawn from wallet), wallet_transfer (internal transfer between users), contractor_payout (payment to contractor), refund (money refunded to customer).

post.description: Get Stripe Connect onboarding link for contractor to connect bank account. The server generates and returns mobile-friendly redirect URLs by default. Just send an empty body {}.

refreshUrl.description: URL to redirect the user if onboarding needs refresh

returnUrl.description: URL to redirect the user after successful onboarding

400.description: Bad request - Only contractors can onboard

get.description: Server-side redirect page after Stripe Connect onboarding. Shows a completion or refresh status page with instructions to return to the mobile app. No authentication required.

200.description: HTML page with onboarding status and instructions to return to the app

get.description: Check Stripe Connect account status and verification requirements

400.description: Bad request - Only contractors can check status
